creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #4)

I think that most ports mentionned in comment #1 could be fixed, for instance:

- sysutils/py-salt version 3004 works fine with python 3.9,  contrary to what the port Makefile claims
- devel/py-aws-sam-translator does build fine with python 3.9
- devel/py-meliae was removed from a few linux distros (archlinux, debian..),  maybe we should do the same

We could also set USE_PYTHON=allflavors to a few ports if really needed but I would rather not do it
